findings.message: New exporter service 'redis-exporter' added but no corresponding Prometheus scrape job exists in infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml. The exporter will run but metrics will not be scraped.
findings.suggestion:
Add a scrape job for redis in prometheus.yml:
  - job_name: redis
    static_configs:
      - targets: ["redis-exporter:9121"]

findings.message: redis-exporter depends on a 'redis' service that does not exist in any compose file. The exporter service will fail to start.
findings.suggestion: Either: (1) Define a redis service in services.yml or the appropriate compose file, or (2) Remove the redis dependency if redis is managed externally

findings.message: New prod runtime surface (redis exporter) added to observability.yml without corresponding alert rules and dashboard. Observability coverage is incomplete.
findings.suggestion: Add alert rules in infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis_alerts.yml (e.g., RedisDown alert) and create a redis dashboard in infra/observability/grafana/dashboards/redis.json
